topic: NOVEL out-of-the-box data-quality capabilities the reuse-first lineages did not propose; per-candidate concept/value/feasibility/floor-survival/go-no-go

focus: KQ1 context-budget optimizer under the truncation floor
novelty: The named candidate splits into a disguised qualityScore reranker (NO-GO as novel, floor-taxed) and a genuinely novel budget-fitting assembler at the envelope layer (envelope.ts:19) that refines top-3 density/diversity AFTER the floor with no re-index; no recall recovery
ruledOut: score-changing budget optimizer (it is the qualityScore reranker, retrieval-class, C2-gated)
optimizer as a recall lever (recall is fixed before the floor runs)

focus: KQ2 LLM-judge wired to the qualityScore consumer + auto-gen answerable-questions/semantic-intent
novelty: The LLM-judge is a better INPUT to the shipped [0.9,1.1] qualityScore multiplier (stage2-fusion.ts:264-296), not a new lane; honest governance value, but the ±10% band caps any retrieval win. answerable_questions/semantic_intent have NO live consumer (grep empty), so auto-gen is a dropped no-op until a fusion consumer is built
ruledOut: LLM-judge as a new ranking lane (the multiplier exists; a second scorer repeats dq-deep's rail)
auto-gen answerable_questions without building the consumer (028 silent-drop trap)

novelty: Auto-rewriting authored bodies is a firm NO-GO re-derived adversarially: it mutates the source of truth to chase a proxy, reward-hacks the embedding, is unprovable per-change (re-index + prod@3 per rewrite), and crosses the no-body-mutate rail. Salvage = suggest-only human-gated diff (GO-on-cost)
ruledOut: closed-loop auto-rewrite-and-re-embed (reward-hacks the proxy on the source of truth)
rewriting to a form-only quality-loop score (a high score is not a retrieval win)

focus: KQ4 KG enrichment auto-extracted from content + auto-summarization rollup nodes
novelty: A rule-based entity extractor already ships (entity-extractor.ts, SPECKIT_AUTO_ENTITIES) so KG-from-content is half-built; the novel delta is LLM TYPED RELATIONS as an L/nav surface (GO-on-cost), NOT a ranking lane. Auto-summarization rollup = the rejected new-node-type + an LLM infidelity multiplier on the parent's net-negative seam (NO-GO)
ruledOut: parallel KG index lane (duplicates the shipped catalog; self-referential community cycle)
summarized-parent embeddings as a retrieval win (net-negative + summary infidelity)

focus: KQ5 cross-doc contradiction/staleness detection + freshness decay auto-refresh queue
novelty: Cross-doc contradiction detection is the lineage's headline novel capability: a clean floor-bypass serving the logic-consistency reader that NOTHING in the reuse-first program touches; grep contradict|staleness=EMPTY. Candidate pairs nominated by the shipped entity catalog + causal graph (not all-pairs), LLM-entailment-scored, report-only. Freshness auto-refresh = thin queue wiring on the shipped FSRS retrievability
ruledOut: all-pairs contradiction scan (O(n^2) LLM passes, intractable/noisy)
a new decay model (FSRS already ships)

focus: KQ6 embedding-drift monitoring + alerting + automatic example/test generation from specs
novelty: Both net-new (grep embedding-drift|generateTest=EMPTY). Drift monitoring reframed precisely as the MIXED-VECTOR guard the reuse-first re-index path (parent Stage 5) needs: per-chunk embedding_context_version + model/normalizer fingerprint, alert on mixed-regime, protects every prod@3 read. Example/test generation is the strongest ADHERENCE lever in the topic, additive + human-approved so it dodges the auto-rewrite rail
ruledOut: drift monitoring as generic model-version abstraction (track concrete mixed-vector coverage instead)
auto-generated tests written as authoritative (must be additive + suggest-and-approve)

focus: KQ7 doc-quality leaderboard/dashboard + per-doc quality SLAs
novelty: Both are floor-IRRELEVANT human instrumentation. The leaderboard is the least-novel item: a presentation of existing signals (quality_score, DQI, stage2-fusion bonuses) redundant with the B1 sweep report (NO-GO, fold in). Per-doc SLAs are a thin GO-on-cost binding: a target field on the description.json governance block + a breach-files-a-report-only-queue-item rule reusing the KQ5/B3 queue
ruledOut: separate quality-dashboard service (duplicates B1 report + DQI)
SLAs that auto-remediate on breach (crosses the no-body-mutate rail)
leaderboard as a reader-facing quality win (human instrumentation, floor-irrelevant)

focus: KQ8 adversarial: which novel candidates survive the truncation law and earn a GO distinct from the reuse-first program
novelty: Converged. Every genuinely-novel GO is a FLOOR-BYPASSER; not one novel candidate recovers floor-cut recall. The candidates that try (auto-rewrite, score-changing budget optimizer, auto-summarization rollup) are exactly the NO-GOs. The two rails survived independent adversarial re-derivation. The novel program is a CORRECTNESS+ADHERENCE program (consistency, integrity, concreteness, density), the axis the reuse-first retrieval program left open
ruledOut: any novel idea beating the floor on recall (none does)
re-litigating the rails (both survived adversarial re-derivation)
